svg.title: Geiger chessboard detector pipeline
svg.desc: 7-stage pipeline from grayscale image through four-quadrant corner likelihood at three fixed scales, NMS, gradient-orientation verification, subpixel refinement, greedy structure recovery, to per-board corner sets.

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle; fill: #111827
